title: eragrostis danesii
intro: Eragrostis danesii, also known as Finger Grass, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Finger Grass include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and aiding in the treatment of urinary tract infections. Finger Grass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
